title: Remote Access and Network Management Paths
description: Provide secure operator, vendor, and user connectivity with recoverable in-band and out-of-band paths. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a least-privilege management access plan while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose VPN scope and tunneling behavior from user and routing needs.
Select SSH, GUI, API, console, and jump-host paths with authentication and audit.
Preserve an out-of-band recovery route without bypassing security.
